a.label: active chart group G_act = S_3
a.standard_term: local chart-permutation group S_3 acting on the three surface roles

b.label: Regular active-role locus (Reg_1, Reg_r)
b.standard_term: locus where the implicit/inverse function theorem applies for every role choice (all relevant partials nonvanishing), i.e. the regular-point locus for the recharting action

evidence.label: Proof of Active Role-Jet Orbit Theorem
